name: Sahil Chandel
title: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science

points: Developed a multi-role gaming platform using React.js, Node.js, Express.js and WebSockets.
Deployed production app on AWS EC2 with Nginx reverse proxy.
Built backend services and validated APIs using Postman, cURL and HTTPie.
Automated scraping workflows using Python, Selenium and BeautifulSoup.
Integrated Selenium scripts with Bash tools on AWS.
Configured virtual display server to avoid scraping detection.
Built Bash pipelines to automate script execution and clear Chrome cache.

projects.name: Honecker Haushalt AI Receptionist (Freelance)
description: Developed an AI-powered voice receptionist for a premium cleaning agency to automate service bookings and job applications.
Built backend services using FastAPI and the Vapi AI framework for real-time voice interaction and workflow automation.
Implemented a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) knowledge base to answer customer FAQs and service-related queries.
Created custom APIs to log real-time booking and applicant data into Google Sheets using Google Sheets API.
Designed an intent detection pipeline to differentiate between customer bookings and employment applications.
Implemented structured data validation using Pydantic to capture customer details such as names, locations, and dates reliably.

projects.name: Golang Blog Platform
description: Built lightweight backend using Go net/http and html/template.
Integrated MongoDB Atlas.
Added LaTeX rendering using MathJax.
Focused on clean design and fast response times.

projects.name: Woods Indica – E-commerce Website
description: Full stack ecommerce with React and Firebase.
Integrated Razorpay payment gateway.
Admin dashboard with analytics.
Dynamic cart and search features.

projects.name: Shalafood – Food Ordering Website
description: MERN stack food ordering platform.
User authentication and role based access.
Real-time cart updates.

projects.name: Loan Credit Risk Analysis
description: Trained ML models including Logistic Regression and XGBoost.
Achieved ROC-AUC of 0.948.
Built FastAPI app for prediction.
